audit_items.proof_trace: All three rounding operations in _getAssetOutAmount are protocol-favorable: mulDivUp at L799 for USD conversion, mulWadUp at L799 for priceMultiplier application, and mulDivUp at L802 for USD-to-assetOut conversion. Since assetOut is what the bidder pays (bid() L453: safeTransferFrom pulls assetOutAmount from the bidder), rounding UP yields assetOutAmount >= fair market value, exactly as the property asserts. The only other caller (L766) is a read-only view function with no economic consequence.
